_comment: Co-op Seed Data template (PLAN v2.2 §3.7 / PLAN v1.3 §6.5). 30-record target distribution: 12 quant_fintech / 8 big_tech / 5 biotech_health / 5 startup. Real curated file lives at data/coop_seed/curated.json (gitignored). Run: uv run python scripts/ingest_coop_seed.py --file data/coop_seed/curated.json --commit. Names in this template are PLACEHOLDERS — do NOT ingest as-is.

_schema_notes.coop_id: Stable string ID. Convention: 'seed-<industry>-<NN>'. Must be unique; ingest is idempotent on coop_id.
_schema_notes.company: Real company name OR generalized bucket if k=2 anonymity at risk (e.g. 'Boston-area quant fund' instead of single firm).
_schema_notes.role: Title as listed by the team. Bucketize if k=2 fails (e.g. 'Quant Research Intern' covers multiple desks).
_schema_notes.industry: Enum: quant_fintech / big_tech / biotech_health / startup / consulting / other.
_schema_notes.duration_months: Integer 1-8. Co-op programs are typically 4 or 6 months.
_schema_notes.related_courses: List of course_id strings (e.g. 'neu-cs-5800') — NOT primary_codes. Use scripts/list_courses.py to resolve.
_schema_notes.interview_summary: PII-redacted free text. PLAN §6.3 redaction SOP. Max 10000 chars.
_schema_notes.salary_range_usd: Bucket only — NEVER exact figure. Examples: '$25-30/hr', '$8k-12k/month', '$80-100k/yr'.
_schema_notes.visibility_level: Auto-derived by ingest script from content presence. Don't set manually:  salary→2, interview/tech→1, else→0.
_schema_notes.redaction_audit: Free text: 'Reviewed by <name> on <date>; redacted candidate name + interviewer last name; bucketed salary'.

records.interview_summary: [PLACEHOLDER] 4 rounds: phone screen with HR (30 min), technical with senior researcher (60 min, probability puzzle + Python), modeling case (90 min, given a dataset asked to identify alpha signal), final loop (3x 45min: stats / behavioral / culture fit). Decisions usually within a week.
records.technical_questions: [PLACEHOLDER] - Coin flip: expected number of flips to see HHT vs HTH? - Implement an order book in Python (priority queue + bisect). - Given returns of 5 strategies, how to combine into one portfolio? Discuss covariance estimation. - Code review of a vectorized pandas snippet, identify the lookahead bias.
records.redaction_audit: [PLACEHOLDER] Reviewed by <curator> on <YYYY-MM-DD>; redacted contributor name + 2 interviewer surnames; bucketed salary.

records.interview_summary: [PLACEHOLDER] 5 rounds total: 2 coding (LeetCode medium-hard, focus on graphs + DP), system design (45 min, designed a URL shortener), behavioral STAR-format, manager screen. Offer in 10 days.
records.technical_questions: [PLACEHOLDER] - LRU cache implementation. - Find the kth largest in unsorted array (heap or quickselect tradeoff). - Design a rate limiter (token bucket vs sliding window). - SQL: top-3 customers by spend per region.
records.redaction_audit: [PLACEHOLDER] Reviewed by <curator> on <YYYY-MM-DD>; redacted team name + product codename.

records.interview_summary: [PLACEHOLDER] 3 rounds: phone screen, technical (statistics review + a small ML modeling exercise on protein expression data), team match. Slow process, ~3 weeks.
records.technical_questions: [PLACEHOLDER] - Differential expression: t-test vs Wilcoxon, when to use which? - Multiple testing correction: Bonferroni vs FDR. - Why use cross-validation in small biology datasets vs holdout?
records.redaction_audit: [PLACEHOLDER] Reviewed by <curator>; bucketed salary, redacted PI name.

records.interview_summary: [PLACEHOLDER] 2 rounds, fast: founder chat (60 min, walked through resume + culture), live coding + design (90 min, built a small RAG pipeline on toy data). Offer in 4 days.
records.technical_questions: [PLACEHOLDER] - Implement attention from scratch in numpy. - When does fine-tuning beat RAG and vice versa? - How would you evaluate a chatbot's hallucination rate without ground truth?
records.redaction_audit: [PLACEHOLDER] Reviewed by <curator>; redacted founder names + product description.

records._comment: Example of bucket-style record when k=2 anonymity at risk: instead of naming a specific firm, use a regional+specialty bucket so multiple contributors land on the same (company, role, term) triple.
records.interview_summary: [PLACEHOLDER] Bucketized record. See coop-seed-quant-01 for shape.
